title: Separation Column type with no "Title" for boards

posts.author: blckhorse (Chris Hollingsworth)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have a new column type that is nothing more than a “separation column” for viewing boards without everything being clustered together.

This used to be possible by adding a “Text” column, deleting the title and adding spaces in the title name. However, after the latest update, it will save the blank title until a change is made to the board, then it reverts back to the default title on the column.

Yes, I could make a text column and rename it “-” but it isn’t as aesthetically pleasing as a blank column for separation.
